direction: drop impossible negative-index checks in kernel bounds guards
rationale: CalculateFluxKernel and UpdateCellKernel derive idx and pos directly from CUDA block and thread indices, which are nonnegative for the configured launches. Removing the impossible idx < 0 and pos < 0 guard terms trims redundant control-flow predicates while keeping the same upper-bound exits and leaving all floating-point expressions untouched.
